description: Build the Swiggy-style design system (theme + reusable widgets) and implement scroll/animation patterns. Covers Phases 5-6 of the migration.
steps: Create lib/theme/app_theme.dart with: primary Color(0xFFFF6600), secondary Color(0xFF22C55E), background Color(0xFFF7F7F7), surface Colors.white. Typography using GoogleFonts.manropeTextTheme() for display and GoogleFonts.interTextTheme() for body. Create both light ThemeData.

Create lib/widgets/product_card.dart: image at top (CachedNetworkImage), name with 2-line clamp, price row showing discountPrice strikethrough + current price, ADD/stepper button at bottom. Use flutter_animate for fade-in on appear.
Create lib/widgets/category_chip.dart: horizontal scroll pill chip with emoji + label, selected state with primary color fill
Create lib/widgets/banner_carousel.dart: PageView.builder with auto-scroll Timer (5s interval), SmoothPageIndicator dots below, CachedNetworkImage for banner images
Create lib/widgets/floating_cart_bar.dart: Positioned at bottom of Scaffold, shows item count + total price + 'View Cart' button. AnimatedSwitcher for show/hide based on cart state
Create lib/widgets/quantity_stepper.dart: Row with minus/count/plus buttons, animated with flutter_animate scale effect on tap
Create lib/widgets/section_header.dart: Bold title on left + 'See all' TextButton on right, accepts title and onSeeAll callback
Create lib/widgets/shimmer_card.dart: Shimmer loading skeleton matching ProductCard dimensions using shimmer package
Create lib/widgets/bottom_nav_bar.dart: 5-tab NavigationBar (M3 style) with tabs: Home, Categories, Cart (with badge), Orders, Account. Orange active indicator using primary color.

Implement scroll patterns in relevant screens: SingleChildScrollView with scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal and BouncingScrollPhysics for category chips. CustomScrollView with SliverGrid and pinned SliverAppBar for product grid. RefreshIndicator wrapping main content with brand-colored spinner.

Implement animation utilities in lib/utils/animations.dart: extension methods or helper functions for fadeInUp (fadeIn + slideY(begin:0.1)), stagger delay pattern (N*50ms), press3d effect (GestureDetector with Transform.scale on tap)
Update main.dart to use AppTheme and include BottomNavBar in the shell route
Run flutter analyze to verify no errors
acceptance_criteria: AppTheme produces a ThemeData with correct primary (#FF6600), secondary (#22C55E), background (#F7F7F7) colors and Manrope/Inter fonts
All 8 widget files exist in lib/widgets/ and compile without errors
ProductCard displays image, clamped name, price, and add button
BannerCarousel auto-scrolls with timer and shows page indicator dots
BottomNavBar has 5 tabs with orange active indicator
FloatingCartBar shows/hides based on cart item count
verification: Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/revathysupermarket/msm_app && flutter analyze
findings: 1. Used .withValues(alpha: x) instead of deprecated .withOpacity(x) for Flutter 3.x SDK compatibility. 2. NavigationBarThemeData uses WidgetStateProperty (not MaterialStateProperty) matching current SDK. 3. Web build emits wasm dry-run warnings for flutter_secure_storage_web (dart:html) but JS build succeeds. 4. ShellRoute wraps Home, Products, Cart, Orders, Account tabs; other routes (product detail, checkout, login, order detail, live tracking, offers) are outside the shell for full-screen navigation.
